SEARCH
Package io.dazzleduck.sql.logger

Class ArrowSimpleLogger

java.lang.Object
org.slf4j.helpers.AbstractLogger
org.slf4j.helpers.LegacyAbstractLogger
io.dazzleduck.sql.logger.ArrowSimpleLogger
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, org.slf4j.Logger
public class ArrowSimpleLogger extends org.slf4j.helpers.LegacyAbstractLogger
SLF4J logger that prints to console and asynchronously sends Arrow batches to Flight server.
See Also:
